title: Mugging Villagers
description: Adds the ability to mug villagers at gun point.
body:
# Mug Villagers!
![A villager being mugged at gun point.](https://imgur.com/R9es0GJ.gif)
Once the player obtains "The Gun" they are able to mug villagers at gun point. Villagers freeze in place, dropping their goods, and running off! Each type of villager has a different set of items they can drop when being mugged. Afterwards the villager will become homeless, unable to get a new job, breed, or (more importantly) be mugged again.

But how does one obtain the gun?
### Meet Lil Ill
![Lil Ill grabbing emeralds off the ground.](https://imgur.com/Bmgdo3H.gif)
Lil Ill is a new raid mob who's main goal is mugging villagers and making bank. With their trusty sidearm they rush the nearest villager to gain as many emeralds as possible. Infighting is common with these guys. They even defend villagers they are currently mugging from the undead to ensure the job is complete!

### Don't mess with the wandering trader
![Wandering Trader becomes enraged](https://imgur.com/QfoC51m.gif)
When threatened, the wandering trader will become enraged! His aim is true and his llamas are filled with wrath. Giving him an emerald will calm him down, while putting him in his place will drop his stock.

The mod also adds two new achievements associated with mugging villagers and 2 with the enraged wandering trader.

(This mod has built in compatibility with a number of other mods (Check change logs of v1.1.1 and v1.1.2 for list), feel free to use Mugging Villagers in any of your modpacks! Just post a link/credit this original page if you do.)
